author: AvantiBit
name: Optimizely Alloy Aspire Scaffold
description: Overlay template that adds .NET Aspire 13.3 orchestration (AppHost, ServiceDefaults, YARP, shared infrastructure, EPiServer.Azure providers for distributed blob and event propagation) to an existing Optimizely CMS 13 GA Alloy project created with 'dotnet new epi-alloy-mvc' (EPiServer.Templates >= 2.0.1). Validates the project is CMS 13; does not migrate from CMS 12.

instances.description: Number of Alloy CMS instances to configure

useHttps.description: Configure YARP and Alloy for HTTPS

choices.description: Randomly select an instance for each request
Pick the least-loaded of two randomly chosen instances
Route to the instance with the fewest active requests
Route to the first alphabetically ordered instance

skipPostAction.description: Skip the post-creation overlay script (generates infrastructure projects only)

postActions.description: Overlay Aspire orchestration + EPiServer.Azure providers onto the existing CMS 13 Alloy project

manualInstructions.text: Run 'pwsh -File post-setup.ps1' in the output directory to overlay Aspire onto your CMS 13 Alloy project. The script validates the project, adds ServiceDefaults + EPiServer.Azure references, wires the Azure blob and event providers to Aspire-injected connection strings, and registers the project in the .slnx.
